title: The Forgotten

moves.title: Dread
effects: Deal damage equal to 15 plus Dexterity

move_pattern: Alternates between Miasma and Dread: Miasma → Dread → Miasma → ...
notes: The Forgotten steals Dexterity from enemies with Miasma, gaining it for itself, which directly increases its Dread attack damage. This creates a scaling threat mechanic where the monster becomes more dangerous as the fight progresses and it accumulates stolen Dexterity.
